languages.text: {n}Словно танцуя, вы избегаете удара. Иждриг воет как разъяренный зверь и совершает серию размашистых ударов, открываясь для атаки.{/n}
{n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Словно танцуя, вы избегаете удара. Иждриг воет как разъяренный зверь и совершает серию размашистых ударов, открываясь для атаки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the strike. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself for an attack.{/n}
{n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

{n}As if dancing, you dodge the strike, slashing back at the colonel's wrist and causing him to drop his weapon. He immediately hits back with a kick to your forearm, stripping you of your blade as well.{/n}
{n}As if dancing, you dodge the strike. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself for an attack.{/n}
{n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}
{n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

languages.text: {n}まるで踊るように一撃をかわし、逆に大佐の手首を斬りつけて武器を取り落とさせる。大佐はすぐさま反撃に転じ、あなたの前腕に蹴りを入れ、あなたの刃もはじき飛ばす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the strike, slashing back at the colonel's wrist and causing him to drop his weapon. He immediately hits back with a kick to your forearm, stripping you of your blade as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}まるで踊るように一撃をかわし、逆に大佐の手首を斬りつけて武器を取り落とさせる。大佐はすぐさま反撃に転じ、あなたの前腕に蹴りを入れ、あなたの刃もはじき飛ばす。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous esquivez le coup avec grâce. Izdrig hurle telle une bête enragée et déchaîne une série de coups non maîtrisés, s'exposant à une riposte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous esquivez le coup avec grâce. Izdrig hurle telle une bête enragée et déchaîne une série de coups non maîtrisés, s'exposant à une riposte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sanki dans ediyormuşçasına kesiği savuşturuyorsun. İzdrig, kuduz bir hayvan gibi uluyor ve bir dizi vahşi, geniş savurmalı saldırı başlatarak kendini savunmasız bırakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sanki dans ediyormuşçasına kesiği savuşturuyorsun. İzdrig, kuduz bir hayvan gibi uluyor ve bir dizi vahşi, geniş savurmalı saldırı başlatarak kendini savunmasız bırakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du weichst dem Hieb aus, als würdest du tanzen. Izdrig heult auf wie ein wildes Tier und attackiert dich mit einer Reihe unkontrollierter Hiebe, ohne auf seine Deckung zu achten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du weichst dem Hieb aus, als würdest du tanzen. Izdrig heult auf wie ein wildes Tier und attackiert dich mit einer Reihe unkontrollierter Hiebe, ohne auf seine Deckung zu achten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Como si de un baile se tratase, esquivas el golpe. Izdrig aúlla como una bestia enloquecida y desata una serie de golpes salvajes y amplios, creando oportunidades para tu contraataque.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Como si de un baile se tratase, esquivas el golpe. Izdrig aúlla como una bestia enloquecida y desata una serie de golpes salvajes y amplios, creando oportunidades para tu contraataque.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你舞蹈般躲过这一击。伊兹德里格像发了疯的野兽般嚎叫着，接连使出数记狂放无章的挥砍，也因此露出了破绽。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你舞蹈般躲过这一击。伊兹德里格像发了疯的野兽般嚎叫着，接连使出数记狂放无章的挥砍，也因此露出了破绽。{/n}
